statement: In every magma, Equation 2544 (`x = (y * ((y * y) * y)) * y`) implies Equation 3642 (`x * y = z * ((w * y) * u)`).
lean_statement:
theorem problem_normal_0782
    {G : Type*} (op : G → G → G)
    (h : ∀ x y z w u : G, x = (op (op y (op (op y y) y)) y)) :
    ∀ x y z w u : G, (op x y) = (op z (op (op w y) u))
